name: hexo-submit-urls-to-search-engine
description: Submit new posts urls to Google,Bing,Baidu search engine to improve the quality and speed of website collection

scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check lib/baidu_submitter.js && node --check lib/bing_submitter.js && node --check lib/cjhreadline.js && node --check lib/generator.js && node --check lib/google_submitter.js && node --check test/smoke.test.js
